all.en: Dear customers, we are writing to sincerely apologize for the recent service disruption.
all.zh: 親愛的顧客，我們致函誠摯地為近期的服務中斷致歉。

all.en: On May 12, our cloud platform experienced an unplanned outage lasting four hours.
all.zh: 五月十二日，我們的雲端平台發生了長達四小時的非預期中斷。

all.en: The incident began at approximately 2:15 in the afternoon, Pacific Standard Time.
all.zh: 事件發生於太平洋標準時間下午約兩點十五分。

all.en: During this period, many users were unable to access their dashboards.
all.zh: 在此期間，許多用戶無法存取其儀表板。

all.en: Some users also reported delays in receiving system notifications.
all.zh: 部分用戶也回報系統通知出現延遲。

all.en: Our engineering team identified the issue within the first 20 minutes.
all.zh: 我們的工程團隊於前 20 分鐘內已找出問題根源。

all.en: The root cause was a misconfigured update to our authentication service.
all.zh: 根本原因為認證服務的設定更新錯誤。

all.en: Once identified, the team rolled back the change and restored full functionality.
all.zh: 找出原因後，團隊隨即回復變更並恢復所有功能。

all.en: We understand how disruptive this incident was for your daily operations.
all.zh: 我們深知此次事件對您日常營運造成相當大的不便。

all.en: Please accept our deepest apologies for the inconvenience caused.
all.zh: 請接受我們對所造成不便的最深歉意。

all.en: Reliability is a core value at our company, and we take this matter seriously.
all.zh: 可靠性是本公司核心價值，我們嚴正看待此事。

all.en: We have launched a full internal review to prevent similar issues in the future.
all.zh: 我們已啟動完整的內部檢討，以防類似事件再次發生。

all.en: New safeguards will be added to our deployment process within the next two weeks.
all.zh: 新增的防護機制將於未來兩週內納入我們的部署流程。

all.en: All future configuration changes will require additional peer review.
all.zh: 未來所有設定變更將需要額外的同儕審查。

all.en: We will also expand our automated testing to include more edge cases.
all.zh: 我們也將擴大自動化測試範圍，涵蓋更多邊界情境。

all.en: As a gesture of goodwill, we are offering a 10 percent service credit this month.
all.zh: 為表達歉意，本月將提供百分之十的服務抵用金。

all.en: The credit will appear automatically on your next billing statement.
all.zh: 此抵用金將自動顯示於您下期帳單中。

all.en: Enterprise customers will receive a detailed technical incident report shortly.
all.zh: 企業客戶將盡快收到詳細的技術事件報告。

all.en: This report will outline the timeline, impact, and remediation steps taken.
all.zh: 報告將詳述事件時序、影響範圍及已採取的改善措施。

all.en: Our support team remains available around the clock for any concerns.
all.zh: 我們的支援團隊全天候提供協助，回應任何疑慮。

all.en: You may reach them through the support portal or by calling our hotline.
all.zh: 您可透過支援平台或撥打我們的熱線聯繫客服。

all.en: Once again, we sincerely apologize and thank you for your patience.
all.zh: 再次致上誠摯歉意，並感謝您的耐心。

all.en: Your trust means everything to us, and we will work hard to earn it back.
all.zh: 您的信任對我們意義重大，我們將努力贏回您的信賴。

all.en: Sincerely, the Customer Operations Team at CloudReach Services.
all.zh: CloudReach Services 客戶營運團隊敬上。
